info.name: 🏠 BDS API - Complete Documentation
info.description:
# 📱 API Hệ Thống Quản Lý Bất Động Sản

## 🎯 Quick Overview

**Total Endpoints:** 43+  
**Version:** v1  
**Last Updated:** 28/01/2026

---

## 🔐 Authentication

### Layer 1: API Key (Required for ALL requests)

```http
X-API-KEY: bds-TTMIxTtE1H6MXIypiiBoa1IfpPA3D0Nb
```

⚠️ **Development Key** - Dùng cho testing  
🔒 **Production** - Sẽ có key riêng khi deploy

### Layer 2: Bearer Token (Required for protected endpoints)

```http
Authorization: Bearer {access_token}
```

✅ Token tự động được lưu sau khi login  
⏰ Access Token: 1 giờ  
🔄 Refresh Token: 30 ngày

---

## 📍 Base URLs

- **Development:** `http://localhost:8000/api/v1`
- **Staging:** `https://staging-api.yourdomain.com/v1`
- **Production:** `https://api.yourdomain.com/v1`

---

## 🧪 Test Accounts

### Super Admin
```
Email: admin@example.com
Password: password
Role: SUPER_ADMIN
```

### Office Admin
```
Email: manager@example.com
Password: password
Role: OFFICE_ADMIN
```

### Field Staff
```
Email: staff1@example.com
Password: password
Role: FIELD_STAFF
```

---

## 🚀 Quick Start Guide

### Bước 1: Setup Environment

1. Import collection này
2. Tạo Environment mới: `BDS Development`
3. Thêm variables:
   - `baseUrl`: `http://localhost:8000/api/v1`
   - `apiKey`: `bds-TTMIxTtE1H6MXIypiiBoa1IfpPA3D0Nb`
   - `token`: (để trống, sẽ auto-fill)

### Bước 2: Login

1. Mở folder **🔐 Authentication**
2. Send request **Login**
3. ✅ Token tự động lưu vào `{{token}}`

### Bước 3: Test Protected APIs

1. Mở folder **🏠 Properties**
2. Send request **List Properties**
3. ✅ Token tự động được dùng

---

## 💡 Features

### Auto Scripts
- ✅ Auto-save access_token sau login
- ✅ Auto-save refresh_token
- ✅ Auto-add API Key header
- ✅ Auto-add Bearer token

### Documentation
- ✅ Chi tiết cho TỪNG endpoint
- ✅ Request/Response examples
- ✅ Field descriptions
- ✅ Error codes explained

### Code Generation
Click nút **Code** (`</>`) ở mỗi request để generate code cho:
- cURL
- JavaScript (Fetch, Axios)
- Python (Requests)
- PHP (cURL)
- Dart (http) - Flutter
- Swift (URLSession) - iOS
- Kotlin (OkHttp) - Android
- Java, Go, Ruby...

---

## 📊 API Categories

| Category | Endpoints | Description |
|----------|-----------|-------------|
| 🔐 Authentication | 7 | Login, Logout, Forgot Password, OTP |
| 🏠 Properties | 7 | CRUD, Search, Filters, Map View |
| 📝 Posts | 6 | CRUD, Renew, Hide |
| 📞 Phone Requests | 3 | Request, Approve, Reject |
| 📋 Reports | 2 | Create, Resolve |
| 📁 Files | 2 | Upload, Download |
| 📚 Dictionaries | 3 | Areas, Categories, Projects (Public) |
| 👤 Profile | 2 | Get, Update |
| 👥 Admin Properties | 3 | List All, Approve, Reject |
| 👥 Admin Users | 8 | CRUD, Lock, Unlock |

---

## ⚡ Rate Limits

| Endpoint Type | Limit |
|---------------|-------|
| Login/Auth | 5 requests/minute |
| Forgot Password | 3 requests/minute |
| General (authenticated) | 60 requests/minute |
| General (unauthenticated) | 20 requests/minute |

---

## 🔒 Security Features

### Data Masking
- `owner_phone`: Masked for FIELD_STAFF (090*****123)
- `LEGAL_DOCs`: Only visible to creator & admin

### Permission Scoping
- **FIELD_STAFF**: Only see properties in assigned areas
- **OFFICE_ADMIN**: See all, can approve/reject
- **SUPER_ADMIN**: Full access

### Workflow Protection
- Properties require approval before visible
- Phone requests require admin approval
- Reports trigger actions (hide post, lock user)

---

## 📚 External Documentation

Tham khảo thêm:
- `DEV_QUICK_START.md` - Quick start cho dev
- `CODE_EXAMPLES.md` - Full code 7 ngôn ngữ
- `API_DOCUMENTATION.md` - API reference đầy đủ
- `PAGINATION_GUIDE.md` - Hướng dẫn phân trang
- `SEARCH_FILTERS_GUIDE.md` - 10+ filters available

---

## 🐛 Common Errors

### 401 - Unauthorized
```json
{"message": "Unauthenticated."}
```
**Fix:** Thiếu hoặc sai Bearer token → Login lại

### 403 - Forbidden  
```json
{"message": "Invalid API Key."}
```
**Fix:** Sai API Key → Check `{{apiKey}}` variable

### 422 - Validation Error
```json
{
  "message": "The email field is required.",
  "errors": {"email": ["...]"}
}
```
**Fix:** Đọc `errors` object để biết field nào sai

---

## 💬 Support

Có vấn đề? Liên hệ Backend Team hoặc xem docs ở folder project.

**Happy Testing! 🚀**

item.name: 🔐 Authentication
item.description:
## Authentication & Authorization APIs

Quản lý toàn bộ flow xác thực user:
- Login/Logout
- Token refresh
- Forgot Password (OTP flow)
- Change Password

### Token Lifecycle

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  1. Login                               │
│  POST /auth/login                       │
│  → access_token (1h)                    │
│  → refresh_token (30 days)              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘
              ↓
┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  2. Use Access Token                    │
│  Authorization: Bearer {access_token}   │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘
              ↓
┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  3. Token Expired?                      │
│  POST /auth/refresh                     │
│  Authorization: Bearer {refresh_token}  │
│  → New access_token                     │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Rate Limits
- **Login:** 5 requests/minute
- **Forgot Password:** 3 requests/minute
- **OTP Verify:** 5 requests/minute

### Security Notes
- ⚠️ Token lưu trong secure storage (Keychain/Keystore)
- ⚠️ HTTPS only trong production
- ⚠️ Không log token ra console

header.description: API Key của ứng dụng (bắt buộc mọi request)

request.description:
## 🔐 Login API

Endpoint để user đăng nhập vào hệ thống.

### Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description | Example |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|----------|
| `email` | string | ✅ | Email đã đăng ký | `admin@example.com` |
| `password` | string | ✅ | Mật khẩu | `password` |
| `device_name` | string | ❌ | Tên thiết bị (để quản lý sessions) | `iPhone 14`, `Android App` |
| `remember` | boolean | ❌ | Nhớ đăng nhập (extend refresh token lifetime) | `true` |

### Success Response (200 OK)

```json
{
  "message": "Đăng nhập thành công!",
  "access_token": "1|KAbu9SG1Ctw+J49BDFveE...",
  "refresh_token": "2|XZy3MNO5Pqr+T67UVwxy...",
  "expires_in": 3600,
  "user": {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Super Admin",
    "email": "admin@example.com",
    "role": "SUPER_ADMIN",
    "phone": "0901234567",
    "area_ids": [1, 2, 3]
  }
}
```

### Error Responses

#### 422 - Validation Error
```json
{
  "message": "The email field is invalid.",
  "errors": {
    "email": ["Email hoặc mật khẩu không chính xác."]
  }
}
```

#### 429 - Too Many Requests
```json
{
  "message": "Too Many Attempts. Please try again later."
}
```

### Implementation Notes

✅ **Token Storage:**
- iOS: Lưu vào Keychain
- Android: Lưu vào EncryptedSharedPreferences
- Web: Secure cookies (HttpOnly, Secure flags)

✅ **Token Usage:**
```javascript
headers: {
  'Authorization': `Bearer ${access_token}`,
  'X-API-KEY': 'bds-TTMIxTtE1H6MXIypiiBoa1IfpPA3D0Nb'
}
```

✅ **Auto Refresh:**
Check token expiry trước mỗi request. Nếu sắp hết → gọi `/auth/refresh`

⚠️ **Security:**
- KHÔNG log token
- KHÔNG lưu trong localStorage (web)
- Dùng HTTPS only

### Flow Diagram

```
User nhập email/password
         ↓
   POST /auth/login
         ↓
  ✅ Valid? → Save tokens → Navigate to Home
         ↓
  ❌ Invalid? → Show error message
```

response.name: Error - Invalid Credentials

exec: // Auto-add API Key to all requests
